STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID HUARD FILED BY AVALOS, BALTHAZAR BLANDING, JAMES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, ROOM 103)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD. APPEARANCE BY OTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT JAMES BLANDING WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON CO-DEFENDANT, WHO IS NOT PRESENT. EDUARDO PANIAGUA INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVALOS, BALTHAZAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,550.00, **** CAUSE AS TO CO-DEFENDANT BAY VIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS.
